hero.title: Verifiable Compute & Formalized Settlements
hero.subtitle: Symbol Science is a fundamental research lab focused on advanced verification primitives and autonomous agent coordination protocols.

labs.title: Formal Verification Labs
labs.description: We operate three specialized research units focused on the intersection of formal logic, verifiable compute, and agentic autonomy.
labs.zkp_desc: Private settlement protocols for secure machine-to-machine exchange.
labs.tee_desc: Secure sandboxing and verifiable execution environments.
labs.logic_desc: Applying Lean 4 and Coq to autonomous agent coordination.

footer.title: Symbol Science Research Lab
footer.subtitle: Verifying the Future of Agentic Intelligence

research.title: Research & Publications

papers.title: Surprisal Theory: Economic Settlement as a Function of Verifiable Entropy
papers.abstract: This paper formulates the Surprisal Protocol, establishing a formal link between cryptographic verification and agentic economic incentives.

papers.title: Emergence Science Protocol: The Trust Foundation for the Agent Economy
papers.abstract: A comprehensive technical overview of the Surprisal Protocol, focusing on Verification-as-a-Service (VaaS) and PoTE (Proof of Task Execution) for decentralized agent commerce.

research.contribute_desc: Symbol Science is an open-research institution. We welcome formal proofs and papers related to the agent economy.
